resources.string:
Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
"Biko kpatụ aka na ọgbara njikọ dị n'okpuru iji gụọ %1$s na %2$s."
"Ọ dịghị adị n'ọ́kwá ngwa nke ugbua"
Nziọkwà ọhụrụ. Kpatụ aka iji lelee
Moodu Nha Nhata ga-ekenye akụ etu egwuregwu ahụ si dị ya na arụmọrụ ekwentị ahụ.
Gosi ozi WhatsApp na Messenger n’ụdị barash
Akwụnyeela, enweghi ike inweta ike ugbua
Baịpasị Inye Ike na-ewetunata mmetụta okpomọkụ ekwentị ka ọ na-agbatị ndụ batrị.
"̈Mgbe ekwentị gị jikọrọ n'ezigbo chaja mgbe a na-agba egwuregwu, Onye ike ga-ahapụ batrị iji nye ekwentị ike kpọmkwem, na-ewetunata mmetụta ikpoọkụ ekwentị ma gbatịa ndụ batrị."
Agbanyeela Baịpasị Inye Ike. A ga-ewetunata arụmọrụ nnweta ike batrị
Agbanyeela Baịpasị Inye Ike. A ga-akwụsị nnweta ike batrị
Pesentị ike e ji enye batrị ike
Malite nnweta ike ka ogo njedebe batrị gbaturu karịa ụgbọ mbanye nnweta ike.
Ntụgharị agba na-enyere aka ịchọpụta karakta ndị na-agagharị n’ime egwuregwu, na-ewelite ohere mmeri gị
"Si n'aka paneelụ mịlaa ime iji gbanyee Paneelụ Mbùàkọnuchè"
Nrụkarịa nhazi ka esi chọọ nke omimi
Ị ga-apụ na moodu nchekwa ike ma ọ bụrụ na ị gbanye Ikenchikọta Espọt-gredi gasị.
Onye Kacha Mkpa ga-adị irè ruo na %s
"Họrọ ngwa 2 iji gbanye window nkenseneelū mgbe a nọ n'egwurgwu."
Naanị ngwa 2 ka a kwadoro maka wondow nkenseneelū
Ngwa 2 ka a chọrọ maka wondow nkenseneelū
Mezie nkwụsịike netwọk mgbe ị na-agba egwuregwu. Ndị ojiarụ ọhụrụ nwere ike ịnwale ya ụfọdụ ụbọchị
"Gbanwee olu gị mgbe ị nọ n'egwuregwu"
Lelee ogologo oge egwuregwu, ojiji data.
Kpabanye iji gosi Paneelụ Moodu Egwuregwu
"Ihe karịrị awa 2 a gbara akwụsịghị akwụsị. Kwụsịtụ tupu ị gawa n'ihu."
"Ihe karịrị awa 4 a gbara na ngụkọta taa. Kwụsịtụ tupu ị gawa n'ihu."
Ka awa 2 nke akwụsịghị egwuregwu gachara maọbụ awa 4 nke mkpokota ọgbụgba egwuregwu

Mgbe agbanyere ya, ụzọnso egwuregwu gasị ka a ga-ezo n’ènyòngosìpụta mbụ. Gbapee ma jikwaa egwuregwu niile nọ na %1$s iji nwee ènyòngosìpụta mbụ dị ọcha ma nwekwaa ahụmahụ ịgba egwuregwu dị nro.
%1$s chọrọ ikikere Nziọkwa gasị iji kwapụgasịa nziọkwa mgbe agbakwụnyere egwuregwu ndị ebudatara ọhụrụ.
Onweghi atụmatụ gasị %1$s maka %2$s. I nwere ike gaa na %3$s site n’egwuregwu ahụ iji gbakwụnye ótù (a na-akwado naanị maka egwuregwu ndị edoziri nke ùhiè).
Họrọ ngwa egwuregwu na ndepụta ahụ. Ngwa ndị a họpụtara ga-arụ ọrụ na moodú egwuregwu.
Gbochie ncheta ndị na-abụghị oku mmbata na mgbịrịgba ncheta
"Ngụ oge ọpụpụ n'egwuregwu maka mbilite n'ọnwụ."
Nye nsonaazụ ịmajijiji na ngosi egwuregwu a kapịrị ọnụ
"Rụkarịa arụmọrụ CPU na GPU n'akpaghị aka iji mezie ahụmahụ egwuregwu"
"Emeziela ka ọ nọrọ n'ọnọdụ kasị mma"
"Emeziela ka ọ nọrọ n'ọnọdụ kasị mma. Mana ị ka kwesiri igbado anya na %1$s."
Gbatunata nchawapụta ihuenyo iji chedo ahụmụzọ anya gị
Kwụsịtụ iji hapụ anya gị zuru ike
Gbalite nchawapụta ihuenyo iji chedo anya gị
Gbado anya na gburugburu gị mgbe ị na-agagharị
"Zere ịdịna n'azụ gị ogologo oge mgbe ị ji ekwentị gị eme ihe"
Gbanye ocheta ahụịke na nchekwa gbasara anya, etu esi nọrọ ọdụ, sistemụ mmegide ọmụmaahụ, dgz.
Gbakwụnye egwuregwu ndị kasị amasị gị na Game Space
Were nsitere ọdịyo mee ka nzọụkwụ dakarịa ụda
"Ntọala niile dị na paneelụ arụmọrụ ga-alaghachi n'ọnọdụ ha nọ mbụ."
Ozugbo agbanyere ya, Ikenchịkọta Okpomọkụ Egwuregwu nwere ike ịgbatunata okpomọkụ ekwentị nke ọma ma gbatịa oge egwuregwu.
Were akọnuche mezie ntụ̀ egwuregwu iji gbaa mbọ hụ na e nwere ahụmahụ egwuregwu nke kaa mma ga-anọ ogologo oge
Agbanyeela Ikenchikọta Espọt-gredi gasị. Okpomọkụ njìarụ nwere ike ịgbago.
Belata ndọkpụgharị mmetụ aka site na teknụzụ njikwa mmetụ ọgbara njikọ zuru oke, mana nkea ga-abawanye okpomọkụ njiarụ ma wetuo ndụ batrị.
Ọgbara ndepụta ndị dị elu na-egosi ojiji ike dị ala na ogologo ndụ batrị kariri ogologo.
Ọgbara ndepụta ndị dị elu na-egosi ọdịmma vidiyo dị elu.
Ọgbara ndepụta ndị dị elu na-egosi ahụmahụ nchịkọta egwuregwu nke ka mma.
Ọgbara ndepụta ndị dị elu na-egosi mgbago okpomọkụ na-akpụ akpụ.
"Ụbọchị %d nke Onye Kacha Mkpa n'efu nwetara nke ọma"
I nweteela ụbọchị %d nke Onye Kacha Mkpa
已开启极致帧率，将为您提供120fps游戏体验
开启后将为你提供120fps的极致游戏体验，但可能导致发热问题。
Mgbochi Mmetu Aka Amaghị ama maka Mmegharị ahụ nke Ngagharị
Mgbe a ga-agbanyụ “Jiri mkpịsịaka 3 mee Nseta Ihuenyo”, ị gaghị enwe ike iwere mkpịsịaka 3 mee nseta ihuenyo.
Mgbe ị na-agba egwuregwu ka ị na-enye njìarụ gị ike, Inye Ike Dị Nkọ ga-ewetunata ike inyeike nke batrị, na-ewetunata mmetụta ịcha ọkụ na-agbatị ndụ batrị.
"Kpatụ aka n'akara ngosi ngwa iji gbakwụnye ya"
Melite ọsọ nzaghachi njikwa site na njikarịcha nke mmetụ na ngosipụta zuru oke, mana nke a ga-eme ka ekwentị kpoo ọkụ.
Njirimara ndịa e depụtara na mgbada dịrị gị adị.
Hazie reeti ibonka nke ime egwuregwu na “Elu” ma gbanye gasị a.
Ị nwere ike ịmalite osise ntọala nke ime egwuregwu site na-ịpị aka na bọtịn olu +/-.
Nkwalite Eserese adịghị na moodu Nlekọta Anya.
已开启优化功耗，将为您提供流畅60fps游戏体验
开启后将为你优化发热和功耗，并提供60fps的高帧游戏体验
Ihe ndị Mgbakwụnye nke Ọgbụgba Egwuregwu
Aha ọhụrụ ahụ agaghị abụ ótù ihe ya na nke ezigbo ya
Nkebiokwu ngafe nke ezighi ezi. Biko nwakwuo ọzọ

Were ọgụgụ isi mata mpaghara ọrụ egwuregwu dị iche iche ma rụlite ya ka o kwesiri iji nye ahụmịhe mmetụ egwuregwu kachasị. Mgbe a gbanyere nkea, a ga-achọpụta mpaghara mmetụ aka na egwuregwu mbụ nke oge egwuregwu ọbụla.
Agbanyụsịa Wi-Fi, a ga-ejikwazị data ekwentị.
"Na-arụkarị nhụta ọdịdị ahụ nọ n'elu ihe; ka ọdịdị ahụ siri ike, bụ ka ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ ndịdebemma ya ga-adị."

Ịma mma nke ọdịdị ahụ egwuregwu. Mmezi nlaghachi azụ na-ewetunata ndịdebemma onyonyoo ka ọ na-akwalite arụmọrụ. (Mgbagote elu na-eme ka onyonyoo dị nro ka ọ na-akwalite arụmọrụ; Mgbadata ala na-emezi nchapụta onyonyoo.)
Mezie maka ndịdebemma dị elu maọbụ ekwomọsọ mmepụta kariri elu.
Ngwa ọzọ ji njiarụ ndekọ na-arụ ọrụ. Biko buru ụzọ mechie ngwa ahụ
Njirimara niile dị na %1$s ga-adị maka egwuregwu a mgbe ebudatachara ya.
Hụ ọdịnihu ojiji CPU nke dị elu iji wetunata ndapụ freemu na ndọghachi azụ
Join us to enjoy magic sound transformation privileges
Enweghị njikọ netwọkụ. Biko lelee ọnọdụ netwọkụ
Gbanwegasịa olu gị n’ime egwuregwu n’oge ozugbo.
I nwere iké ikekọrịta nzaghachi site na %1$s maọbụ kpọtụrụ anya na %2$s.
"Bọtịn awansi na-enye gị ohere ikepụtacha ọrụ ndị dị n'ènyòngosìpụta rue bọtịn ogoolu a na-ahụ anya, bịa mezie ọrụ bọtịn ogoolu ka e siri chọọ maka egwuregwu."
Pigide ogologo oge ma dọkpụrụ bọtịn + maọbụ - gaa na mpaghara ebe ị chọrọ isepụta ntọala ma gbapụ ya
Hazie ọrụ bọtịn olu maka egwuregwu
Ekepụtachaala ọrụ bọtịn ogoolu. Enweghizi ike iji bọtịn ogoolu ahazi ogoolu, mana ị nwere ike iwegote paneelụ iji mee nke ahụ.
Welite SmartPanel ma were ya hazie olu
Kedu ka m ga-esi dozie ogoolu mgbe Bọtịn Awansi ka a gbanyere agbanye?
Pido aka ogologo oge ma dọrọ “+” gaa na bọtịn Ọkụ
Ị nwere ike gbanye/gbanyụọ ọrụ nkewapụta nke bọtịn ogoolu nke ọbụla, ma kpatụ aka na Ọzọ iji wube ọrụ maka bọtịn nke ọbụla.

"Ị nwere ike ihazi ọrụ bọtịn ogoolu ka e siri chọọ maka egwuregwu. Iji maa atụ, dọrọ bọtịn \"+\" na foto ahụ gaa na bọtịn Ọkụ n'ihuenyo egwuregwu, ị bịa chekwaa ntọala ya wee banye n'egwuregwu. Ugbua ị nwere ike ịpị aka na bọtịn Ogoolu Elu iji malite ịgba egbe."
Mmetụta ewelitere na-emezi mmetụta mmetuaka, ka mmetụta e weturu na-emezi nkwụsịike ikenchịkọta ma wetunata nnọchi na mmetuaka ndị na-ezighi ezi.
Mgbe a gbanye ya, ọ na-eweta nchịkọta ahụmahụ maka egwuregwu ma wetunata oge nzaghachi ikenchịkọta.
"Ka nzaghachi si dị elu, bụ ka nzaghachi mkpafe ga-esi mee ọsọọsọ. Ka nzaghachi si dị ala, bụ ka nkwụsịike ahụmụụzọ n'oge mkpafe ga-adị."
Ezi izi ezi ka-enye nchọpụta eziokwu doro anya nke njikwa pere ezigbo mpe, ebe obere izi ezi na-ewetunata mmetuta nye njikwa ndịa mana na-emelite nguzosiike arụmọrụ.

"Daalụ maka ntụkwasị obi gị na iji ngwaahịa na ọrụ anyị gasị. Iji nye ngwaahịa na ọrụ anyị gasị, anyị kwesiri inweta ịntanetị, chọọ ụfọdụ ikikere sitere n'ekwentị gị, ma jiri ozi nkeonwe gị: 1. Site na ndabere nke enyemike gị, anyị ga-enweta ozi akaụntụ sistemụ gị maka mbanye. 2. Site na ndabere nke enyemike gị, anyị ga-enweta ozi atụmahịa gị na akara ekwentị iji mezuo akwụmụgwọ atụmahịa ma nye ọrụ ndị akwụrụ ụgwọ ya kwekọrọ ekwekọ. Ndabere iwu maka nhazi anyị na-ahazi ozi gị bụ nkwenye gị maọbụ nkwekọrịta ọrụ anyị na gị. Site na ịkpatụ aka na Kwekọrịta, ị gosi nkwekọrịta gị doro anya n'usoro okwu ndị e dere n'ime Nkwekọrịta Òjìarụ na Amụma Nzuzo anyị."
"Site n'ịkpatụ aka na KWERE, i kwere n'okwu ndị ekwuputara na %s na %s anyị."
"Ejikọla na Wi-Fi n'akpaghị aka mgbe ojiji netwọk ekwentị."
Were amamihe họrọ Wi-Fi na data ekwentị iji wetuo ndọkpụgasị netwọọkụ. Enwere ike iri data ekwentị ma mgbe ejikọtara netwọọkụ Wi-Fi.
Nye nkwado akụ netwọọkụ ka esiri chọọ maka egwuregwu ndị nke ugbua nwere teknụzụ mmelite netwọọkụ egwuregwu ikike mpụrụiche.
No network connection. Please check your network and %s
A gaghịzị ama ọkwa ozi ndị si na ngwa ndị na-anọghị na ndepụtankwere n’oge ọgbụgba egwuregwu.
Akwadoghị windo nkensenelū na ngwa ebe mmepụta nke ugbua
Gosi ozi WhatsApp na Messenger n’ihu ihuenyo n’ụdị barash
"Site na ịpị KWEERE, ị kwenyere n'usoro ekwuru na anyị %s na %s."
"Daalụ maka ntụkwasị obi gị yana iji ngwaahịa na ọrụ anyị. Site na ịpị KWEERE, ị kwenyere n'usoro ekwuru na anyị Nkwekọrịta Ojiarụ na Amụma Nzuzo."

"Daalụ maka ntụkwasị obi gị yana iji ngwaahịa na ọrụ anyị. Iji nye ngwaahịa na ọrụ anyị, ọ kwesịrị ịnweta ịntanetị ma chọọ ụfọdụ ikike nke ekwentị gị, yana chọkwara ịnakọta ma jiri ụfọdụ data gị. Ebumnuche nke nhazi anyị bụ ịkwalite ahụmịhe ojiarụ ọrụ yana inye gị ọrụ. Ndabere iwu kwadoro nke anyị na-ahazi data gị bụ nkwenye gị kwekọrọ n'iwu dị."
"Siri n'akụkụ ihu egwuregwu kpapụta paneelụ ahụ."

Moodu Arụmọrụ ga-emezi arụmọrụ nke ekwentị ma dịkwa mma maka egwuregwu ndị nke asọmpị. Mgbe a gbanyere ya, ọ ga-eweta foto ndị ndịdebemma ya dị elu, mana ọ ga-ewelite oriri ike na okpomọkụ njìarụ. A na-atụ aro ka a gbaa na gburugburu na-enweghi okpomọkụ dị elu.

"Onweghị ikikere dị mkpa.
Biko kpatụ \"Ntọala\"-\"Ikikere\"-Gbanye Ikikere."
"We need some of the permissions you rejected or the system failed to apply failed, please manually set to the page authorize, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
"You have rejected us to apply for authorization, please agree to authorization, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
Kpatụ aka iji lelee %1$s na %2$s. Site na-ịkpatụ aka na “Kwenyee”, ị na-ekwenye n’ikike mwube na nkwekọrịta anyị.
Mgbanye Moodu Nchekwa Ike ga-ewtunata arụmọrụ njìarụ ma gbatịa ndụ batrị. Ọ dị mma maka egwuregwu ndị na-achọghị ndịdebemma onyonyoo dị elu.
%1$s ga-amalite ma mmalitegharị egwuregwu ahụ gasịrị, biko malitegharịa egwuregwu.
A ga-agbanyụ nrụkarịa kọstọm maka egwuregwu a ka egwuregwu malitegharịchara
A ga-agbanye nrụkarịa dị ka esi chọọ maka egwuregwu a ka mmalitegharị egwuregwu a gasịrị
Gbanwee olu dị ire na egwuregwu. Banye %1$s.
E nweghi data dị. Biko nwaa ọzọ ma emesịa
Osuso ụzọ ọkụ: na-abịa abịa gbanyere agbanye %s
Kpalite mmetuta ọkụ ozugbo iji kepụta onyonyoo egwuregwu ka dị ìrè.
Mbubata vidyo agaghị. Biko nwaa ọzọ ma emesịa

"%1$s nnukwu ndagharị a chọpụtara n'ime netwọk egwuregwu n'oge egwuregwu nke ikpeazụ, yana okwu %2$d nke ọkpụkpụ netwọk wepụtara isi nakwa ogbugbuoge netwọk nke kachasị nke %3$d ms. Ịgbanye mgbalite netwọk egwuregwu nwere ike inyere gị aka iwetunata ogbugbuoge ka ọ nọrọ na %4$d ms ma welite ọsọ netwọk na %5$d%%"
Gbanyụọ Moodu Egwuregwu maka egwuregwu a?
"Ngagharị sistemụ kwesịrị ka a kpatee ya ugboro abụọ n'usoro iji gbochie ọpụpụ amaghị ama n'egwuregwu ahụ."
Mgbe Moodu Egwuregwu gbanyere agbanye, gbanyụọ nchawapụta akpaaka nwa obere oge iji hụ na o metụtaghị mgbachi.
Gosi Paneelụ Onyeaka Egwuregwu maka ahụmahụ egwuregwu ndị ọzọkwa nwere isi.
Eruola njedebe ókè dị elu nke atụmatụ gasị
Hazie atụmatụ %1$s ka e siri chọọ na Paneelụ Onyeaka Egwuregwu ka e gosiri ebea. I nwere ike ibubata maọbụ kekọrịta atụmatụ gasị.
Dara ibubata atụmatụ. Biko lelee ma ogo mmepụta ahụ adakọtara
Ebubatara atụmatụ nke ọma. Biko lelee n’egwuregwu kwekọrọ ekwekọ
Ṅomie nkebiokwu ngafe %1$s ma kekọrịta ya gị na ndị enyi gị. Ogo mmepụta ndị %2$s kwadoro atụmatụ: %3$s
Njuoyi Dị Nkọ mgbe Ịgba Egwuregwu
Jide ma dọlie elu iji gbanwee ọnọdụ.
Jide ma dọkpụrụ iji gbanwee ọnọdụ
Mịlaa ime iji gbanye Paneelụ Mbùàkọnuchè ma mepee ngwa na windo nseneelu.
"Were mgbanwe weta njirimara dị nkọ dịka ndepụta okwu ka ọ na-eme ma ntụgharị ihuenyo n'uju n'ụfọdụ ndepụta."
Mepee ńgwá ngwa ngwa na windo nseneelu
Akwadoghị Njirima̵ra nke Moodù Egwuregwu ugbua na moodu nkewa ihuenyo
Ntinyekọ foto dị iche iche ka ọ bụrụ FPS 120
Failed to boost. Please check your network and try again
Nke a nwere ike iwelite ojiji ike & okpomọkụ ekwentị.
Onweghị njikọ netwọk. Biko lelee netwọk gị ma nwaa ọzọ
Biko tinye SIM kaadị wee nwakwuo ọzọ
Nweta Onye Kacha Mkpa ma Bulite
Oge mbanye agafeela. Biko banyekwuo ọzọ.
Hazie mmetuta njikwa na nzaghachi ọsịsọ dabere na mmasị gị na ogo ọrụ nka.
Nzaghachi mkpatụ ahụ ka nwee mmetuta dị nro, dabara adaba maka egwuregwu ndị MOBA.
Ọrụ ahụ ka aza ọsịsọ, dabara maka egwuregwu ịgba égbè.
Nzaghachi mmetụ ahụ ka enwe mmetụta dị nro na nke ziri ezi, dabara adaba maka ọtụtụ egwuregwu.
"Mezie ahụmahụ nkiri gị site n'igbochi nziọkwà site n'inye gị nsogbu."
Mịlaa ma si n’isi isi ihuenyo jide iji mepee paneelụ onyeaka Vidiyo
Onye Kacha Mkpa Xunyou gị agbaala ochie
Ahịrị ọpụrụiche nke Onye Kacha Mkpa
"Ndị ojiarụ ọhụrụ nwere ike inweta %d ụbọchị (ndị) nke Onye Kacha Mkpa n'efu"
Ihe ndị nrite nke Onye Kacha Mkpa
Onye Kacha Mkpa ga-adị irè ruo na %s
